summary: Comprehensive methodology document explaining the 3-phase, 12-step pipeline for transforming original scripts into new content. Covers: Phase 1 (Analysis: style extraction, framework detection, blueprint extraction), Phase 2 (Design: framework recommendation, reality check, completeness check, outline creation), Phase 3 (Write & Verify: sequential chapter writing, cross-review, merge). Includes practical 5-step guide for creating pipelines for new niches, with emphasis on separating DATA (blueprint) from STYLE (style guide) as the core principle.
